query: I have an experimental side-project classifier I'm trying on a small research dataset to see if a new architecture is worth pursuing. There's no production deployment, no users consuming the predictions, and no other services depend on it. Do I need a rollback plan?
expected_behavior: Does NOT engage the full rollback-runbook workflow for an experimental research-only model with no production surface and no downstream consumers
Explains that rollback machinery (versioned artifact store + runbook + drill + smoke-test gate) is for production systems with real impact, not throwaway / experimental work
Optionally suggests revisiting the rollback discipline if and when the model is considered for actual deployment, but does NOT block the experimental work on a rollback plan now
